익스트림무비 50분 전

레터박스 사이트에 실시간으로 올라온 반응들입니다. 모두 옮겨보려 했는데... 너무 빠르게 많이 올라와서 중간에 많이 건너 뛰었어요. 대충 분위기는 ...레터박스 사이트에 실시간으로 올라온 반응들입니다. 모두 옮겨보려 했는데... 너무 빠르게 많이 올라와서 중간에 많이 건너 뛰었어요. 대충 분위기는 ...

'호프' 혹평. "CG가 형편없다..."'호프' 혹평. "CG가 형편없다..." (한국어)
익스트림무비 1시간 전

인디와이어의 데이비드 얼리치가 점수를 D+ 주면서 혹평했습니다. 아래 들어가면 자세한 리뷰가 나오는데... 스포가 될 것처럼 좀 묘사가 자세해요. ht...인디와이어의 데이비드 얼리치가 점수를 D+ 주면서 혹평했습니다. 아래 들어가면 자세한 리뷰가 나오는데... 스포가 될 것처럼 좀 묘사가 자세해요. ht...

[호프] 보그 프랑스 리뷰[호프] 보그 프랑스 리뷰 (한국어)
익스트림무비 2시간 전

[호프]가 2026년 칸 영화제 최고의 충격작으로 떠올랐다. 다소 단조로운 경쟁 부문 라인업으로 인해 가라앉아 있던 영화제 초반 분위기 속에서, 한국의...[호프]가 2026년 칸 영화제 최고의 충격작으로 떠올랐다. 다소 단조로운 경쟁 부문 라인업으로 인해 가라앉아 있던 영화제 초반 분위기 속에서, 한국의...

“웃다가 울게 된다”… 이범규 감독, '뽀삐'와 함께 숏폼 시장 새 브랜드로 떠오르다“웃다가 울게 된다”… 이범규 감독, '뽀삐'와 함께 숏폼 시장 새 브랜드로 떠오르다 (한국어)
맥스무비 1일 전

배우이자 감독, 이범규. 맥스무비 DB낮에는 반려견, 밤에는 재벌 2세. 다소 엉뚱한 설정의 숏폼 드라마를 설득력 있게 완성해내는 연출자가 있다. 코미디와 감정선을 동시에 잡아낸다는 평가를 받는 이범규 감독이다.이범규 감독이 연출한 숏폼 드라마 ‘뽀삐가 재벌남으로 돌아왔다’가 지난 12일 글로벌 숏폼 플랫폼 비글루(Vigloo)를 통해 공개됐다.작품은 무지배우이자 감독, 이범규. 맥스무비 DB낮에는 반려견, 밤에는 재벌 2세. 다소 엉뚱한 설정의 숏폼 드라마를 설득력 있게 완성해내는 연출자가 있다. 코미디와 감정선을 동시에 잡아낸다는 평가를 받는 이범규 감독이다.이범규 감독이 연출한 숏폼 드라마 ‘뽀삐가 재벌남으로 돌아왔다’가 지난 12일 글로벌 숏폼 플랫폼 비글루(Vigloo)를 통해 공개됐다.작품은 무지

‘디렉터스 아레나’ 첫 방송부터 2049 시선 사로잡았다… ENA 금요 기대작 부상‘디렉터스 아레나’ 첫 방송부터 2049 시선 사로잡았다… ENA 금요 기대작 부상 (한국어)
맥스무비 1일 전

ENA 새 예능 ‘디렉터스 아레나’가 첫 방송부터 2049 시청층의 시선을 사로잡으며 순조로운 출발을 알렸다.16일 시청률 조사회사 닐슨코리아에 따르면 지난 15일 밤 첫 방송된 ‘디렉터스 아레나’는 ENA 금요일 심야 시간대 편성에도 불구하고 2049 시청층에서 의미 있는 점유율을 기록했다. 특히 첫 방송 본편은 2049 개인 기준 점유율 1.71%를 나ENA 새 예능 ‘디렉터스 아레나’가 첫 방송부터 2049 시청층의 시선을 사로잡으며 순조로운 출발을 알렸다.16일 시청률 조사회사 닐슨코리아에 따르면 지난 15일 밤 첫 방송된 ‘디렉터스 아레나’는 ENA 금요일 심야 시간대 편성에도 불구하고 2049 시청층에서 의미 있는 점유율을 기록했다. 특히 첫 방송 본편은 2049 개인 기준 점유율 1.71%를 나

배우 이유진, 메가폰 잡았다… 숏드라마 서바이벌 ‘디렉터스 아레나’ 첫방부터 ‘눈길’배우 이유진, 메가폰 잡았다… 숏드라마 서바이벌 ‘디렉터스 아레나’ 첫방부터 ‘눈길’ (한국어)
맥스무비 1일 전

디렉터스 아레나. ENA 화면 갈무리배우 이유진이 숏드라마 감독으로 변신해 강렬한 첫인상을 남겼다. 지난 15일 첫 방송된 ENA의 새 서바이벌 예능 프로그램 ‘디렉터스 아레나’에서는 12년 차 배우에서 연출자로 도전장을 내민 이유진 감독의 첫 번째 미션 과정이 전파를 탔다.이날 방송에서 이유진은 자신의 첫 연출작으로 ‘길이 보이면 캐스팅해’를 선보였다.디렉터스 아레나. ENA 화면 갈무리배우 이유진이 숏드라마 감독으로 변신해 강렬한 첫인상을 남겼다. 지난 15일 첫 방송된 ENA의 새 서바이벌 예능 프로그램 ‘디렉터스 아레나’에서는 12년 차 배우에서 연출자로 도전장을 내민 이유진 감독의 첫 번째 미션 과정이 전파를 탔다.이날 방송에서 이유진은 자신의 첫 연출작으로 ‘길이 보이면 캐스팅해’를 선보였다.

Cannes Audience Gives ‘Hope’ A 7-Minute Standing OvationCannes Audience Gives ‘Hope’ A 7-Minute Standing Ovation
Deadline 1시간 전

Filmmaker Na Hong-Jin’s in Competition sci-fi thriller Hope received a seven-minute standing ovation in Cannes this evening. Na praised the audience for staying with his two hour and forty minute epic alien thriller. During the premiere screening, at least three incredible action set-pieces drew exuberant applause. Had it ended 20 minutes earlier, the applause would’ve been […]Filmmaker Na Hong-Jin’s in Competition sci-fi thriller Hope received a seven-minute standing ovation in Cannes this evening. Na praised the audience for staying with his two hour and forty minute epic alien thriller. During the premiere screening, at least three incredible action set-pieces drew exuberant applause. Had it ended 20 minutes earlier, the applause would’ve been […]

‘Hope’ Review: It’s Aliens Vs. South Korean Villagers In Na Hong-Jin’s Wild Non-Stop Action-Driven Genre Movie – Cannes Film Festival‘Hope’ Review: It’s Aliens Vs. South Korean Villagers In Na Hong-Jin’s Wild Non-Stop Action-Driven Genre Movie – Cannes Film Festival
Deadline 1시간 전

Much has been written about this year’s Cannes Film Festival being ignored by studios and crowd-pleasing blockbuster type movies, in favor of the more familiar auteur driven quieter films. Well, fasten your seat belts. Cannes just unveiled Hope, a sci fi Alien monster mash from South Korean director Na Hong-Jin that never lets up for […]Much has been written about this year’s Cannes Film Festival being ignored by studios and crowd-pleasing blockbuster type movies, in favor of the more familiar auteur driven quieter films. Well, fasten your seat belts. Cannes just unveiled Hope, a sci fi Alien monster mash from South Korean director Na Hong-Jin that never lets up for […]

‘Hope’ Unleashes a Bats— Crazy Korean Monster Movie on Cannes and Earns 6-Minute Standing Ovation‘Hope’ Unleashes a Bats— Crazy Korean Monster Movie on Cannes and Earns 6-Minute Standing Ovation
Variety 1시간 전

“Hope” — an extremely ambitious blockbuster hopeful about an alien invasion in a sleepy South Korean mountain town — jolted the Cannes Film Festival awake on Sunday night with a 6-minute ovation. Directed by Na Hong-jin, the big-budget epic combined a gritty survival story and an original sci-fi mythology — no one quite knew what […]“Hope” — an extremely ambitious blockbuster hopeful about an alien invasion in a sleepy South Korean mountain town — jolted the Cannes Film Festival awake on Sunday night with a 6-minute ovation. Directed by Na Hong-jin, the big-budget epic combined a gritty survival story and an original sci-fi mythology — no one quite knew what […]

‘Hope’ Review: Na Hong-jin’s Overlong Creature Feature is a Guns-Blazing Riot of Bawdy Humor, Bad CGI and Brilliant Action‘Hope’ Review: Na Hong-jin’s Overlong Creature Feature is a Guns-Blazing Riot of Bawdy Humor, Bad CGI and Brilliant Action
Variety 1시간 전

For a decade, since 2016’s extraordinarily uncanny horror-hybrid “The Wailing,” fans of Korean director Na Hong-jin have been peering anxiously at the horizon awaiting his next uncategorizable genre mash-up. More recently, like a bumbling local police chief removing his mirrored aviators to squint at an unidentifiable what-the-hell-is-that wreaking havoc in the distance, we’ve tracked reports […]For a decade, since 2016’s extraordinarily uncanny horror-hybrid “The Wailing,” fans of Korean director Na Hong-jin have been peering anxiously at the horizon awaiting his next uncategorizable genre mash-up. More recently, like a bumbling local police chief removing his mirrored aviators to squint at an unidentifiable what-the-hell-is-that wreaking havoc in the distance, we’ve tracked reports […]

‘Hope’ Review: Korean Action Maestro Na Hong-jin’s Rip-Roaring Sci-Fi Creature Feature Has Instant Cult Classic Written All Over It‘Hope’ Review: Korean Action Maestro Na Hong-jin’s Rip-Roaring Sci-Fi Creature Feature Has Instant Cult Classic Written All Over It
The Hollywood Reporter 1시간 전

Hwang Jung-min, Zo In-sung and Hoyeon star in this thriller about rural villagers fending off what appears to be a violent invasion, also featuring Michael Fassbender and Alicia Vikander.Hwang Jung-min, Zo In-sung and Hoyeon star in this thriller about rural villagers fending off what appears to be a violent invasion, also featuring Michael Fassbender and Alicia Vikander.

‘Hope’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, Hoyeon Jung & More‘Hope’ Cannes Film Festival Premiere Photos: Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, Hoyeon Jung & More
Deadline 3시간 전

The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Hope, the latest film from director  Na Hong-Jin.  Hong-Jin was joined by the stars of the film, including Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, and Hoyeon Jung, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand Théâtre Lumière on Saturday, May 16. […]The Cannes Film Festival hosted the world premiere of Hope, the latest film from director  Na Hong-Jin.  Hong-Jin was joined by the stars of the film, including Alicia Vikander, Michael Fassbender, Taylor Russel, Go Soo, Hwang Jeong-min, and Hoyeon Jung, who all walked the red carpet at the Grand Théâtre Lumière on Saturday, May 16. Deadline 3시간 전

The gloves are off. Maxime Saada, Canal+ Chair and CEO, has hit back at an open letter launched on the opening night of the Cannes Film Festival sounding the alarm over tycoon Vincent Bolloré’s growing control of the French entertainment and media sectors. ‘A Girl’s Story’ Review: Judith Godrèche’s Assured Feature Debut Tells a Bitter Tale of Sexual Initiation in 1950s France‘A Girl’s Story’ Review: Judith Godrèche’s Assured Feature Debut Tells a Bitter Tale of Sexual Initiation in 1950s France
Variety 3시간 전

The resemblance between Judith Godrèche and her daughter Tess Barthélemy — also the luminous lead of her mother’s debut feature “A Girl’s Life” — will be particularly powerful for anyone familiar with Godrèche’s teenage breakthrough role in the 1990 Jacques Doillon drama “The Disenchanted.” Watching the doe-eyed Barthélémy in this assured adaptation of Annie Ernaux’s […]The resemblance between Judith Godrèche and her daughter Tess Barthélemy — also the luminous lead of her mother’s debut feature “A Girl’s Life” — will be particularly powerful for anyone familiar with Godrèche’s teenage breakthrough role in the 1990 Jacques Doillon drama “The Disenchanted.” Watching the doe-eyed Barthélémy in this assured adaptation of Annie Ernaux’s […]

The Hollywood Reporter 3시간 전

With his sinister new role in Is God Is, Sterling K. Brown was eager to work with writer/director Aleshea Harris on her feature debut. At the Cannes Film Festival you expect to get into big arguments about the quality of the movies on view. It goes with the territory. Everyone has an opinion and most are not afraid to give one. Deadline 4시간 전

In what looks to be the longest – and certainly one of the most enthusiastic – standing ovations of the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, Jeanne Herry’s Garance received a wild 12-minutes of applause after the film ended. Co-stars Adèle Exarchopoulos, Sara Giraudeau and Mathilde Roehrich could be seen exchanging hugs and the plaudits continued. Competition […]In what looks to be the longest – and certainly one of the most enthusiastic – standing ovations of the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, Jeanne Herry’s Garance received a wild 12-minutes of applause after the film ended. ‘Another Day’ Review: Adèle Exarchopoulos Gives an Understated and Deeply Lived-In Performance in Jeanne Herry’s Graceful Alcoholism Drama‘Another Day’ Review: Adèle Exarchopoulos Gives an Understated and Deeply Lived-In Performance in Jeanne Herry’s Graceful Alcoholism Drama
Variety 4시간 전

From Billy Wilder’s “The Lost Weekend” to the Sandra Bullock-starrer “28 Days” and beyond, cinema has a long tradition of substance abuse and recovery stories. There is something inherently cinematic and moving about a struggling person’s by-the-bootstraps journey to healing, with a lifetime’s worth of trials and tribulations. Just two years ago, Nora Fingscheidt’s tough […]From Billy Wilder’s “The Lost Weekend” to the Sandra Bullock-starrer “28 Days” and beyond, cinema has a long tradition of substance abuse and recovery stories. Moby Joins Paris-Set Queer Comedy ‘Jim Queen’ Ahead Of Cannes PremiereMoby Joins Paris-Set Queer Comedy ‘Jim Queen’ Ahead Of Cannes Premiere
Deadline 6시간 전

EXCLUSIVE: Moby and Lindsay Hicks of Little Walnut have signed on as executive producers for Nicolas Athane and Marco Nguyen’s animated feature film Jim Queen, which is world premiering at Cannes this evening. Directed by Nicolas Athane and Marco Nguyen, Jim Queen was written by Athane with Simon Balteaux and Brice Chevillard. The film is produced by David Alric and Arthur Delabays. Arthur Cohen, […]EXCLUSIVE: Moby and Lindsay Hicks of Little Walnut have signed on as executive producers for Nicolas Athane and Marco Nguyen’s animated feature film Jim Queen, which is world premiering at Cannes this evening. Ryan Gosling Was Fired From ‘Lovely Bones’ After Gaining 60 Pounds. Peter Jackson Now Speaks Out: ‘Anytime We Recast an Actor, It’s Actually Our Fault’Ryan Gosling Was Fired From ‘Lovely Bones’ After Gaining 60 Pounds. Peter Jackson Now Speaks Out: ‘Anytime We Recast an Actor, It’s Actually Our Fault’
Variety 6시간 전

Peter Jackson is finally weighing in on Ryan Gosling’s infamous recasting in “The Lovely Bones,” the director’s 2009 adaptation of Alice Sebold’s novel. Gosling was originally cast as the father of Saoirse Ronan’s lead character, but revealed to THR in 2010 that he was fired from the movie after he gained 60 pounds for the role without […]Peter Jackson is finally weighing in on Ryan Gosling’s infamous recasting in “The Lovely Bones,” the director’s 2009 adaptation of Alice Sebold’s novel. The Hollywood Reporter 6시간 전

Elsewhere, Curry Barker's horror pic 'Obsession' opened well ahead of expectations with $16 million, while the Michael Jackson biopic was among a number of holdovers celebrating major milestones as it crossed $700 million globally in its fourth weekend and 'Prada 2' neared $550 million.Elsewhere, Curry Barker's horror pic 'Obsession' opened well ahead of expectations with $16 million, while the Michael Jackson biopic was among a number of holdovers celebrating major milestones as it crossed $700 million globally in its fourth weekend and 'Prada 2' neared $550 million.

Variety 7시간 전

Andy Samberg answered this one for us back in 2020. Here’s the short version (because we’ve gone over this). ‘Laalo’ Producers Soul Sutra Unveil 12-Film Gujarati Slate at Cannes Film Market, Eye Global Co-Productions (EXCLUSIVE)‘Laalo’ Producers Soul Sutra Unveil 12-Film Gujarati Slate at Cannes Film Market, Eye Global Co-Productions (EXCLUSIVE)
Variety 7시간 전

Indian production company Soul Sutra is presenting a 12-film Gujarati-language development and production slate at the Cannes Film Market this week. The banner is led by Indian National Film Award-winning actor-producer Manasi Parekh and singer-producer Parthiv Gohil, who co-produced “Laalo – Krishna Sada Sahaayate” – the Ankit Sakhiya-directed devotional drama that became the highest-grossing Gujarati-language […]Indian production company Soul Sutra is presenting a 12-film Gujarati-language development and production slate at the Cannes Film Market this week. The banner is led by Indian National Film Award-winning actor-producer Manasi Parekh and singer-producer Parthiv Gohil, who co-produced “Laalo – Krishna Sada Sahaayate” – the Ankit Sakhiya-directed devotional drama that became the highest-grossing Gujarati-language […]

French Tech Entrepreneur Adrien Nussenbaum Launches Palatio Films With Daniel Auteuil’s Cannes Movie ‘When Night Falls’French Tech Entrepreneur Adrien Nussenbaum Launches Palatio Films With Daniel Auteuil’s Cannes Movie ‘When Night Falls’
Variety 7시간 전

Adrien Nussenbaum, the French tech entrepreneur who co-founded e-commerce powerhouse Mirakl, is stepping into the movie business with the launch of Palatio Films, a new production company making its Cannes debut with Daniel Auteuil’s WWII drama “When Night Falls.” Bowing at Cannes Premiere, the film marks a major career pivot for Nussenbaum, who recently stepped […]Adrien Nussenbaum, the French tech entrepreneur who co-founded e-commerce powerhouse Mirakl, is stepping into the movie business with the launch of Palatio Films, a new production company making its Cannes debut with Daniel Auteuil’s WWII drama “When Night Falls.” Bowing at Cannes Premiere, the film marks a major career pivot for Nussenbaum, who recently stepped […]

Deadline 7시간 전

With the search officially underway for the next James Bond, it appears Donald Trump is trying to dust off what remains of his onscreen career. Variety 7시간 전

Can’t stop the King of Pop. “Michael,” a biopic about the musical icon, has cleared a major box office milestone with more than $700 million globally. Over the weekend, the film returned to No. 1 at the international box office with $57.7 million from 83 foreign markets. As Hollywood Pulls Back, Northern Ontario Steps UpAs Hollywood Pulls Back, Northern Ontario Steps Up
The Hollywood Reporter 7시간 전

With tax credits that stack to 45 percent, lakes that double as the Arctic and a production ecosystem built for tighter budgets, this is one of the industry's most compelling shooting alternatives.With tax credits that stack to 45 percent, lakes that double as the Arctic and a production ecosystem built for tighter budgets, this is one of the industry's most compelling shooting alternatives.

At a Cannes where some have grumbled about a paucity of studio movies (and thus stars), the absence of Scarlett Johansson at last night’s premiere of Paper Tiger was notable. During the movie’s rousing 10-minute standing ovation director James Gray tried to make a call to the actress, according to reports and social media videos.
